description: Educational documented-targets fixture for the Phase 22 Task 3 liquidity exposure-notional derivation and 7x7 liquidity-coupling calibration. Exposure inputs anchor the forced-sale haircut notional to the educational GMMB backing portfolio; coupling targets encode documented stress co-movement of funding/liquidity spreads with the other six drivers and are recovered from a seeded joint monthly synthesis by a CIR transition-residual correlation estimator.

exposure_inputs.rationale: backing_asset_mv = units * S0 = sum_assured of the educational equity-linked GMMB book (the policyholder fund at issue, matching EquityGuaranteeSpec initial_index_level 100); illiquid_share = 0.55 documented HK participating-fund style allocation to corporate-bond / illiquid credit assets; forced_sale_fraction = 0.40 mass-lapse forced-sale analogue (Solvency II Delegated Reg. Art. 142 mass-lapse 40% shock). exposure_notional = backing_asset_mv * illiquid_share * forced_sale_fraction = 22000.

coupling_sources_note: liq_spread +0.50: corporate-bond illiquidity and credit spreads co-move strongly in stress (Dick-Nielsen, Feldhutter & Lando 2012; EIOPA volatility-adjustment basis); liq_equity -0.30: flight-to-liquidity against equity drawdowns (Amihud 2002; Pastor & Stambaugh 2003); liq_rate -0.10: flight-to-quality lowers risk-free rates when liquidity premia spike; liq_lapse +0.15: funding stress historically coincides with elevated surrender / policy-loan activity; liq_fx +0.15: HKD funding-spread stress episodes coincide with peg-pressure FX stress (HKMA); liq_mortality 0.00: no documented dependence between mortality trend and funding liquidity.

monthly_synthesis.method: Correlated standard-normal monthly innovations for the seven drivers via the Cholesky factor of the governed 6x6 block extended by the target liquidity couplings; the liquidity premium path is generated from its innovation column with the full-truncation Euler CIR++ scheme at the Phase 21 Task 3 G-LIQ calibrated parameters; the estimator must recover the couplings from the PATH via CIR transition residuals (not from the latent innovations). 1200 synthetic months keeps the recovery sampling SE near 0.029, i.e. 4-sigma headroom against the 0.12 tolerance (no seed selection).

documented_sources_note: Educational documented-targets fixture, NOT credentialled market data. Production use requires a credentialled joint liquidity/credit/equity/rate/FX/lapse dataset and an independent APS X2 review.
notes: Replaces the SevenDriverCorrelation liquidity-coupling educational placeholders (0.05, -0.20, 0.35, 0.10, 0.0, 0.10) and the LiquidityExposureSpec placeholder notional (30000).
